findings.criterion: tests/unit/test_plan_review_sidecar.py proves a pre-feature sidecar reader ignores additive reviewed_related_material and otherwise behaves identically.
findings.detail: The file tests/unit/test_plan_review_sidecar.py exists and has exactly two tests: one proving the round-trip serialization (schema remains plan_review_result_v2, field is present and parseable) and one proving an absent field returns None (legacy-unpinned). Neither test calls latest_review_result with a payload containing reviewed_related_material to demonstrate the pre-feature reader returns an otherwise-identical payload. The criterion explicitly requires proving the reader 'ignores additive reviewed_related_material and otherwise behaves identically,' which demands a test exercising that read path.

findings.criterion: Sidecars remain plan_review_result_v2, and a pre-feature v2 reader ignores additive reviewed_related_material.
findings.detail: The schema identifier plan_review_result_v2 is preserved in build_payload (confirmed in sidecar.py). However, the second clause — 'a pre-feature v2 reader ignores additive reviewed_related_material' — is not tested by any test explicitly exercising latest_review_result with a v2 payload that contains the new field. The same gap identified for AC 8 applies here: the test file does not contain a test demonstrating that the reader returns an otherwise-identical dict when the additive field is present.

data.remediation: How to resolve the unmet criteria: for each one, decide whether the work is genuinely incomplete or simply undocumented. If a requirement is already satisfied but the proof is not discoverable from the code alone, add a comment to this ticket that documents the evidence — cite the concrete artifacts that meet the requirement (file paths and line ranges, commands and their output, links, or the reasoning that ties the work to the criterion). The completion verifier reads this ticket's comments, so evidence you record there is taken into account on the next verification. For any criterion whose work is genuinely unfinished, complete it, then re-verify.
